ground_truth.title: Armchair detectives! Here are 10 "excellent" mystery shows coming to ITV, Netflix, BBC and more soon
ground_truth.author: Ruth Lawes, Nathalie Whittle, Chris Longridge
ground_truth.main_content:
Love a good murder? Want to get the little grey cells firing over the festive period? To save you having to turn your magnifying glass to the TV schedules, we've combed through them for you to select the very best mysteries coming up soon. There's Netflix's first Agatha Christie adaptation, Agatha Christie’s Seven Dials, which sees Helena Bonham-Carter and Martin Freeman becoming embroiled in a fatal event at a sprawling country pile. Plus, there's Treasure & Dirt, where the murder of a local miner rocks a small, rural community in the Australian desert and Eve Myles is making a welcome appearance on our screens in ITV's latest mystery thriller Gone.

1. Agatha Christie's Seven Dials - Netflix's adaptation of The Seven Dials Mystery starring Helena Bonham-Carter and Martin Freeman, set at a lavish country house party in 1925. Arrives January 15.

2. Deadloch - Prime Video's second season follows mismatched detectives Dulcie Collins and Eddie Redcliffe investigating the death of Eddie's former policing partner. Arrives March 20.

3. Treasure & Dirt - BBC drama set in an Australian opal town where a local miner is found brutally beheaded. Features detectives Ivan Lucic and Nell Buchanan. Likely 2026.

4. Gone - ITV thriller starring Eve Myles as Detective Annie Cassidy investigating a disappearance, tracking down suspect Michael Polly. Expected 2026.

5. Dustfall - BBC mystery based on The Unbelieved, follows Detective Tig investigating drink-spiking assaults in her Australian hometown. Expected 2026.

6. Murdoch Mysteries - Period detective series set in early 1900s Canada, featuring William Murdoch using cutting-edge techniques. Season 19 arrives January 2026.

7. Ludwig - BBC cosy mystery drama with David Mitchell impersonating his detective brother James. Season two arrives 2026.

8. The Case - Netflix thriller following investigator Thomas Berg hunting a murderer who targets his police colleagues. Arrives 2026.

9. The Bay - ITV detective drama centred on DS Jenn Townsend investigating crimes in Morecambe. Season six arrives 2026.

10. Death Valley - BBC comedy crime drama pairing detective Janie Mallowan with retired actor John Chapel. Season two arrives 2026.
with: Love a good murder? Want to get the little grey cells firing over the festive period?
There's Netflix's first Agatha Christie adaptation, Agatha Christie’s Seven Dials, which sees Helena Bonham-Carter and Martin Freeman becoming embroiled in a fatal event at a sprawling country pile.
In Gone, Eve Myles is playing a gutsy detective – of course, because she's really, really good at it.

Prepare yourself for your next TV addiction in the form of Dustfall. Based on Vikki Petraitis' expertly plotted novel, The Unbelieved, the six-part mystery covers important themes like injustice, failing legal systems and institutionalised misogyny.
Deadloch is one of the best series we've seen in years, so we were thrilled when Prime Video finally announced the arrival of the second season.
